network.status_command: ip addr show rmnet4; ip addr show tun0; ip route show

data_reconnect.command: svc data disable && sleep 20 && svc data enable

airplane_bounce.command: cmd connectivity airplane-mode enable && sleep {{AIRPLANE_HOLD_SECS}} && cmd connectivity airplane-mode disable

network_mode_bounce.command: settings put global preferred_network_mode1 3 && settings put global preferred_network_mode 3,9 && svc data disable && sleep 15 && svc data enable && sleep 20 && settings put global preferred_network_mode1 9 && settings put global preferred_network_mode 9,9 && svc data disable && sleep 15 && svc data enable

ril_bounce.command: stop ril-daemon && stop ril-daemon1 && sleep 8 && start ril-daemon && start ril-daemon1 && sleep 35
